Tornado.Cash IPFS - Updated Working RPC Nodes

Tornado Cash IPFS proxy with working RPC nodes is now available, the privacy-enhancing transaction tool that breaks the on-chain link between recipient and destination addresses. With Tornado, you can deposit ETH into a smart contract and withdraw it at a later time from a different address, with no way to link the withdrawal to the deposit. This ensures complete privacy for your transactions.

To make a deposit, simply generate a secret and send its hash along with the deposit amount to the Tornado smart contract. The contract will accept the deposit and add the commitment to its list of deposits. When you're ready to withdraw, the smart contract will check the proof and transfer funds deposited into it back to you. An external observer will be unable to determine which deposit this withdrawal comes from making Tornado Cash the perfect tool for preserving your privacy.

Looking for a way to keep your files safe and secure? Look no further than IPFS hosting! IPFS uses thousands of nodes to store your files forever. Tornado Cash on IPFS keeps running safe and sound with working RPC nodes. What's more, IPFS is fully decentralized, meaning that there's no need to worry about government sanctions or other interference. So why wait? Sign up today and enjoy the peace of mind that comes with knowing your privacy is safe and sound!

When using Tornado Cash, it's important to keep your anonymity in mind. Here are a few tips:

  • First, use a VPN, proxy, or Tor to hide your IP address. This will make it more difficult for someone to track you down.
  • Second, wait until there are a few deposits after yours before withdrawing. This will help keep your transactions private.
  • Finally, clear cookies for dapps before using your new address. This will help ensure that your transactions aren't linked together.

Tornado Cash IPFS is open source and is constantly being updated and improved by a community of developers. The latest updates to include speed improvements and RPC node updates and bug-fixes. By collaborating with other developers, we can ensure that our software is always up-to-date and and functioning. We believe that financial privacy is a fundamental right, and we will continue to fight for it. We encourage all users to take measures to protect their own privacy, and we will continue to do our part to keep Ethereum, BNB, Polygon Matic and other blockchains safe and secure platforms for all.
